svg.title: Proxmox MS-01 cluster — triangle topology
svg.desc: Three MINISFORUM MS-01 Proxmox nodes in a triangle. pve1 top, pve2 bottom-left, pve3 bottom-right. Each node connects to the switch via enp87s0 vmbr0. Nodes are fully meshed with 10GbE DAC on SFP+ ports for Ceph and Corosync ring1.
svg.text: 10GbE DAC — same port pair (f0↔f0 or f1↔f1)
